certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No explicit AI risk/impact assessment or lifecycle controls
Missing transparency, auditability and human oversight mechanisms beyond basic escalation
No evidence of performance monitoring, bias controls or continual improvement processes
recommendations: Implement formal AI risk assessment and impact analysis per ISO 42001
Add decision logging, explainability features and defined human-in-the-loop review
Establish metrics for ongoing monitoring and improvement of the order validation process

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No explicit AI risk/impact assessment or lifecycle controls
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
